prompt: Review this Apex trigger and update the .cls service class with bulk-safe tests.
Build a record-triggered flow for Opportunity and update the .flow-meta.xml definition.
Refactor this Salesforce LWC component and fix the .js and .html files.
Pull the official help.salesforce.com docs for Omni-Channel routing and summarize the guidance.
Create a Snowflake Data Cloud connection, browse source objects, and test the connector setup.
Create a Data Cloud data stream, inspect the DLO, and rerun the ingestion job.
Map Data Cloud data to canonical DMOs and configure identity resolution for unified profiles.
Publish a Data Cloud segment, run a calculated insight, and count the audience members.
List activation targets and create a data action for downstream Data Cloud delivery.
Run a hybrid Data Cloud search, describe the table, and inspect the search index.
